div.head: G區概覽
div.p: 該區位於北岩大臥佛的東西兩側，包括四座洞窟和一座浮雕墓塔。 , 為G區西段的平面及立面圖，包含1、2號窟。由立面圖可見，臥佛位於石窟的東邊。西部的1、2號窟為一組雙窟，左右毗鄰，自西向東編號。 此二窟與涅槃像被崖面上的一塊凸起岩塊分隔開來。2號窟東壁距佛足約9米。四座洞窟之中只有1、2號窟刻有經文。
只開鑿了一半的123號窟和無任何內容的125號窟（自東向西編號），分別位於臥佛以東228米和150米處的崖面上。 123號窟西側10米遠的地方，是編號為124號的浮雕墓塔。 2008年，作為洞窟保護工程的一部份， 有關部門在臥佛上方的崖頂檯面上開出一條排水溝。但有一些批評意見指出，這一舉措產生了負面效果， 實際上加重了1、2號窟的滲水現象。

figure.head: G區西段的平面及立面圖
Ground plan and elevation of the western part of section G

div.head: Section G
div.p: In the northern cliff, to the west and east of the giant statue of the reclining Buddha, section G comprises four caves and one tomb pagoda in relief. Figure shows the ground plan and the elevation of the western part of section G with caves 1 and 2. In the elevation, the figure of the Reclining Buddha is seen to the east of the two caves. The two western caves, 1 and 2, are twin caves which are arranged side by side and have been numbered from west to east. They are separated from the reclining figure by a bulging part of the cliff. The eastern wall of cave 2 is 9 meters away from the feet of the statue. Of the four caves, only these two (1 and 2) are carved with sutras.

The half finished cave 123 and the empty cave 125 (numbered from east to west), are situated 228 and 150 meters, respectively, to the east of the Bud­dha figure. Ten meters to the west of 123 is the tomb pagoda 124. In 2008 a ditch was dug in the horizontal area on top of the cliff, above the reclining Buddha figure, to drain away water. Some critics maintain that this measure has had the opposite effect and has actually increased the amount of water in caves 1 and 2.
